mods.name: Fallout 4 Script Extender (F4SE)
mods.notes: Mandatory: Used for nearly all F4SE plugins, Recommended for all users

mods.name: Buffout 4
mods.notes: Crash-/Memory-/Engine-Fixes, Basis for Stability, Recommended for all users

mods.name: Address Library for F4SE Plugins
mods.notes: Mandatory: Required by most F4SE plugins to locate game functions/addresses

mods.name: High FPS Physics Fix
mods.notes: Prevents physics bugs at framerates above 60 FPS

mods.name: Baka ScrapHeap
mods.notes: Increases available memory heap, reduces crashes in large sessions

mods.name: Canary Save File Monitor
mods.notes: Warns about save file corruption before it becomes a problem

mods.name: Unofficial Fallout 4 Patch
mods.notes: Community-maintained collection of fixes for vanilla bugs missed by official patches. IMPORTANT: The current Nexus main file listing (2.2.1a) requires game version 1.11.221 and is NOT compatible with our 1.10.163 setup. Version 2.1.5 is the correct Old-Gen version, but has been archived by the author and is no longer in the normal file list. Obtain it via the direct archive link documented in the jotc-ufo4p-cfm-links entry

mods.name: JOTC - Unofficial Fallout 4 Patch (UFO4P) - Community Fixes Merged
mods.notes: Not a mod itself - provides direct download links to archived Old-Gen (1.10.163) versions of UFO4P (2.1.5) and Community Fixes Merged, bypassing Nexus's normal file list where these versions have been archived by their original authors. Part of the Jewel of the Commonwealth Modding Guide project. Use this as the source to actually obtain unofficial-fallout4-patch and community-fixes-merged at the correct version for our game version

mods.name: Community Fixes Merged
mods.notes: Merged collection of individual community bugfix mods not covered by UFO4P. IMPORTANT: The original Nexus page (mod ID 58020) has been removed entirely by its author. Obtain via the direct archive link documented in the jotc-ufo4p-cfm-links entry (Nexus ID 100847) instead

mods.name: Previsibines Repair Pack (PRP)
mods.notes: Repairs broken precombines/previsibines, major performance improvement especially in Boston, PRP-compat-pointlookout.esp goes AFTER the mod downloaded from here [Point Lookout Essential Fixes], or else previs will likely go wonky.

mods.name: Extended Dialogue Interface (XDI)
mods.notes: Extends dialogue menu functionality, required by several UI mods including FallUI

mods.name: Mod Configuration Menu (MCM)
mods.notes: In-game settings menu framework, required by many mods for configuration. Verify version matches game 1.10.163, not Next-Gen builds.

mods.name: LooksMenu
mods.notes: Mandatory: Character/face editor overhaul, required by many appearance mods. Verify version matches game 1.10.163, not Next-Gen builds.

mods.name: FallUI - Inventory
mods.notes: Redesigned inventory menu with sorting, icons and filtering

mods.name: FallUI - HUD
mods.notes: Highly configurable HUD with in-game layout manager

mods.name: FallUI - Map
mods.notes: Overhauled world/local map with better markers, search and readability

mods.name: FallUI - Workbench
mods.notes: Redesigned crafting/workbench menus with larger display and comparison columns

mods.name: FIS - The NEW FallUI Item Sorter
mods.notes: Official item sorting/tagging system for FallUI Inventory, HUD and Workbench

mods.name: FallUI - Icon Library
mods.notes: New icon library with customizable icons for use across FallUI mods, required by FIS - The NEW FallUI Item Sorter

mods.name: Better Console - F4SE
mods.notes: Improved developer console with detailed target info. Confirmed compatible with game version 1.10.163

mods.name: ENBSeries (Fallout 4 binary)
mods.notes: Base graphics injector by Boris Vorontsov, required by all ENB presets. Not hosted on Nexus. v0.496 reported as most broadly compatible with existing presets; v0.501 has known issues with water/SSS/fog. Check which binary version the chosen preset (NAC X) was built for.

mods.name: NAC X - Natural and Atmospheric Commonwealth
mods.notes: Combined weather overhaul and ENB preset

mods.name: Fallout 4 HD Overhaul
mods.notes: HD texture overhaul (1K-8K) covering base game and DLCs, by luxor8071

mods.name: Visible Galaxy 4k and Framework
mods.notes: Adds a visible Milky Way galaxy to the night sky in 4K. Required by Fallout 4 HD Overhaul (Luxor's)

mods.name: SavrenX HD Vanilla Landscape
mods.notes: Enhanced vanilla landscape/terrain textures with restored depth and detail

mods.name: SavrenX HD 1K Buildings and Interior
mods.notes: 1K building/interior textures, optimized to be smaller than vanilla while looking sharper

mods.name: SavrenX Landscape Interior Building DLC
mods.notes: DLC counterpart to Landscape/Buildings packs, covering Far Harbor, Nuka-World and Automatron. Verify exact DLC coverage on the mod page.

mods.name: SavrenX HD Settlement and Clutters
mods.notes: Enhanced settlement objects and clutter items (furniture, signs, workbenches, etc.). DLC version bundled on same mod page.

mods.name: SavrenX HD Junk and Props DLC
mods.notes: Enhances almost all junk and props from the DLCs to highest quality with smallest file size

mods.name: SavrenX HD Vanilla Armor
mods.notes: Enhanced vanilla armor textures, capped at 2K for performance on high-spawn items

mods.name: SavrenX HD Vanilla Clothes
mods.notes: Enhanced vanilla clothing textures

mods.name: SavrenX HD DLC Armor and Clothes
mods.notes: Armor and clothing textures for Far Harbor, Automatron and Nuka-World

mods.name: SavrenX Weapon HD DLC
mods.notes: Enhanced weapon textures for DLC weapons. Details unverified beyond mod name/ID, check page directly.

mods.name: SavrenX Creature Pack DLC REDONE
mods.notes: Enhanced creature textures for base game and DLC, excluding Deathclaw/Ghoul/Robot

mods.name: SavrenX Organic Gore
mods.notes: Enhanced gore/dismemberment textures. Details unverified beyond mod name/ID, check page directly.

mods.name: SavrenX Organic Super Mutant
mods.notes: Enhanced Super Mutant skin textures. Details unverified beyond mod name/ID, check page directly.

mods.name: SavrenX Super Mutant Armor HD
mods.notes: Enhanced Super Mutant armor/gear textures. Details unverified beyond mod name/ID, check page directly.

mods.name: Boston Natural Surroundings
mods.notes: Adds dense forest vegetation across the Commonwealth. Designed to preserve precombines when enabled correctly per mod page instructions.

mods.name: Enhanced Lights and FX (ELFX)
mods.notes: Atmospheric interior lighting overhaul

mods.name: ELFX - PreVis PreCombine Patch
mods.notes: Regenerates precombines for ELFX, includes PRP-compatible fixes. Important for compatibility with our PRP setup.

mods.name: Interiors Enhanced - Darker Ambient Light and Fog
mods.notes: Reduces ambient light/fog in unlit interior corners, complements ELFX rather than replacing it

mods.name: Hunkered Down - Commonwealth Overhaul (No Atom Cats Garage variant)
mods.notes: Updates 30+ locations to look more lived-in and survivable (fewer open fire light sources, added decoration). IMPORTANT: Select the variant WITHOUT the Atom Cats Garage changes on the Files tab - avoids the only precombine break in this mod, better PRP compatibility. Optional separate file adds settlement location tweaks (Hangman's Alley, Oberland Station, etc.)

mods.name: Unlimited Fast Travel - F4SE
mods.notes: Removes fast travel restrictions (interior, survival mode, overweight, combat, etc.)

mods.name: QuickTrade Redux
mods.notes: Adds quick trade/inventory access to merchants, settlers and companions without dialogue menus. Enhanced fork of the original QuickTrade mod

mods.name: Place Everywhere
mods.notes: Removes settlement building placement restrictions (red highlighting), makes scrap-only objects movable. Confirmed compatible with game version 1.10.163

mods.name: Faster Terminal Displays
mods.notes: Speeds up terminal text display (choice of 2x-100x). Simple, low-risk ESP with no known conflicts

mods.name: Workshop Framework
mods.notes: Mandatory dependency for Sim Settlements 2. Opens settlement system for community modding, faster/more stable workshop scripts

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2
mods.notes: Main quest and settlement gameplay overhaul, Chapter 1

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Chapter 2
mods.notes: Continues SS2 story, adds 3 new side questlines

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Chapter 3
mods.notes: Concludes SS2 story, settlement warfare content

mods.name: Atomic Radio and Tales from the Commonwealth
mods.notes: Large quest/companion/settler mod plus radio station. Incomplete previs data on its own, see companion patches

mods.name: Tales from the Commonwealth - Precombined Visibility Patch
mods.notes: Adds missing previs/precombine data to Tales from the Commonwealth cells

mods.name: Emirals Tales From The Commonwealth Fixes
mods.notes: Compatibility fixes for UFO4P and DLCs. Confirmed to work with game version 1.10.163

mods.name: America Rising 2 - Legacy of the Enclave
mods.notes: DLC-sized Enclave faction questline, successor to the original America Rising

mods.name: Fourville
mods.notes: New town/vault quest hub, ~10 hours of content, fully voiced

mods.name: Fourville - eXoPatch
mods.notes: Fixes visual glitches and quest bugs in Fourville

mods.name: The Machine and Her
mods.notes: DLC-sized quest with fully voiced companion. Requires Far Harbor, Nuka-World and Automatron. Use with Revival replacer below

mods.name: The Machine and Her Revival
mods.notes: Community rebuild: cleaned cell headers, rebuilt navmesh, new previs/precombines, many bugfixes. Original still needed for texture archive

mods.name: Outcasts and Remnants - Quest Mod Plus
mods.notes: Large voiced quest mod, foundation for Project Valkyrie

mods.name: Project Valkyrie
mods.notes: Endgame-focused quest mod, uses Outcasts and Remnants as required master file

mods.name: Fusion City Rising
mods.notes: Large underground city quest mod, less strictly lore-friendly than others in this list

mods.name: Children of Ug-Qualtoth
mods.notes: Lore-friendly Lovecraftian horror dungeon quest with unique enemies and custom music

mods.name: Maxwell's World
mods.notes: DLC-sized horror quest in a haunted amusement park, multiple endings. Conflicts with XDI without patch below

mods.name: Maxwell's World XDI Patch
mods.notes: Required compatibility patch since our setup includes XDI

mods.name: Depravity - A Bit of Harmless Fun
mods.notes: Quest/companion mod by the Outcasts and Remnants/Project Valkyrie author, focused on morally darker player choices and an antagonist-leaning faction. Tonally different from the rest of this list

mods.name: Immersive Animation Framework
mods.notes: Full set of immersive ingestible/interaction animations

mods.name: Tactical Reload
mods.notes: Framework for tactical/partial reload animations on vanilla and modded weapons

mods.name: Bullet Counted Reload System (BCR)
mods.notes: F4SE plugin enabling reloads based on actual rounds fired instead of always topping off to full magazine. No ESP, no load order slot used

mods.name: Reverb and Ambiance Overhaul
mods.notes: Improves weapon sounds, ambience and reverb realism, fixes several vanilla audio bugs

mods.name: Commonwealth Warfare - Explosions
mods.notes: Replaces explosion sounds with crisper, more realistic versions including ear-ringing effect. Confirmed compatible with Reverb and Ambiance Overhaul

mods.name: RobCo Patcher
mods.notes: Runtime patching framework (F4SE/CommonLibF4-based) allowing mod authors to modify ammo, NPCs, races, weapons and more without plugins. Required by Better Locational Damage - RobCo Patch and 500+ other mods

mods.name: Arbitration - Combat AI - Stealth - Speed - Damage - Gameplay Overhaul and Tweaks
mods.notes: Modular gameplay-setting tweaks: stealth detection, grenade behavior, fall damage, movement speed, survival damage. All features individually toggleable

mods.name: Better Locational Damage
mods.notes: Scripted headshots, dismemberment, bleeding, stagger and backstab damage. Actively maintained with MCM support

mods.name: Better Locational Damage - RobCo Patch
mods.notes: Automatically patches ammo, NPCs, races and weapons from other installed mods against Better Locational Damage via RobCo Patcher

mods.name: Combat AI Empowered
mods.notes: Modifies enemy combat styles based on faction/weapon type (flanking, cover-seeking, ranged vs melee behavior). Complements Arbitration rather than replacing it

mods.name: The Fens Sheriff's Department - Bleachers 2
mods.notes: DLC-sized location and quest mod, February 2023 Mod of the Month, sequel to The Bleachers

mods.name: South of the Sea - Atoms Storm
mods.notes: Standalone replacement for the original South of the Sea (do not install both). Adds a large explorable area south of the Glowing Sea with new NPCs, factions and locations

mods.name: The Beantown Interiors Project
mods.notes: Opens up many boarded-up buildings across the Commonwealth for exploration. Missing previs data on its own, see companion patch

mods.name: The Beantown Interiors Project - Precombined Visibility Patches
mods.notes: Adds missing previs/precombine data to Beantown Interiors cells

mods.name: Goodneighbor Expanded
mods.notes: Expands Goodneighbor with new interiors, NPCs and purchasable player homes. Previs/precombine already generated by the author

mods.name: Subway Runner - Revival
mods.notes: Actively maintained revival of the classic Subway Runner, restores vanilla precombines and adds PRP-style precombines for new cells

mods.name: Diamond City Expansion
mods.notes: Expands Diamond City and Fenway Park with new explorable areas. Complete but no longer updated by the author

mods.name: Diamond City Expansion - eXoPatch
mods.notes: Fixes collision, precombine and visual glitches in Diamond City Expansion

mods.name: Open Lexington
mods.notes: Opens several closed buildings in Lexington with balanced, vanilla-consistent loot. Chosen over Lexington Interiors due to that mod's excessive loot

mods.name: Stumble Upon Interiors
mods.notes: 11 atmospheric unmarked interiors across the Commonwealth. Tagged Lore-Friendly and Fair-and-balanced, loot intentionally kept at or below vanilla levels. Confirmed compatible with Beantown Interiors Project

mods.name: Backported Archive2 Support System (BASS)
mods.notes: Backports the newer BA2 archive loading code from game version 1.10.980 to 1.10.163, allowing the downgraded game to load mods packaged in the newer archive format without crashing. Do not install on game version 1.10.980 or later

mods.name: Mutant Menagerie - Life Finds A Way
mods.notes: Full creature and ecosystem overhaul: 60+ new mutants, new flora, fishing, crafting recipes. Final version, replaces all previous Mutant Menagerie releases (Big Game Hunting, Horrors of the Deep Fog, Nuclear Safari are retired). Requires BASS on our downgraded 1.10.163 setup

mods.name: The HD Enhancement Project - Creature Edition
mods.notes: Retextures nearly all vanilla and DLC creatures (Super Mutants, ghouls, Mirelurks, Yao Guai, etc.) at 2K or 4K. Requires Far Harbor and Nuka-World for the full All-in-One version. Does not cover Deathclaws

mods.name: LC's UHD Deathclaw
mods.notes: AI-upscaled texture replacer for Deathclaw and all variants, same file size as vanilla HD textures but significantly sharper. Fills the Deathclaw gap left by the Creature Edition pack

mods.name: The HD Enhancement Project - Robots Edition
mods.notes: Retextures Assaultrons, Protectrons, Sentrybots, Mr. Handy/Nanny/Gutsy, Eyebots, Robobrain, Swarmbots, Gen 1 Synths, and synth/robot armor. Requires Automatron and Nuka-World

mods.name: Improved Hostile Factions
mods.notes: Comprehensive overhaul of Gunners, Raiders, Super Mutants and Children of Atom with new variants and gear. Actively maintained (last updated July 2026), lore-friendly. Marked 'Broken in Next-Gen Update' which is irrelevant for our 1.10.163 setup

mods.name: Heather Casdin - A Unique Companion Experience
mods.notes: Fully voiced custom companion with 2400+ lines, own questline across Far Harbor and Nuka-World. Version 2 requires no XDI/FDI patch

mods.name: Ellen - the cartographer
mods.notes: Fully voiced custom companion with 1200+ lines, affinity system, lore-friendly New Vegas backstory

mods.name: Amazing FollowerTweaks Plus (AFT Plus)
mods.notes: Modern, actively maintained multi-companion framework with SS2 support. Alternative to Simple Everyone's Best Friend for players wanting more than Dogmeat+1. Mutually exclusive, do not run both

mods.name: Improved Minutemen
mods.notes: Lore-friendly overhaul making the Minutemen resemble a proper Continental Army, on par with other major factions. Part of the same 'Improved Faction' mod series as Improved Hostile Factions, designed for compatibility

mods.name: Improved Railroad
mods.notes: Lore-friendly overhaul making the Railroad resemble a proper Underground Railroad, on par with other major factions. Part of the Improved Faction series

mods.name: Improved Institute
mods.notes: Overhauls the Institute to weaponize their teleportation technology, making them a credible threat/power. Part of the Improved Faction series

mods.name: Improved Brotherhood of Steel
mods.notes: Makes the Brotherhood of Steel a true power in the Commonwealth, fixes vanilla balance where elite squads die to two Super Mutants. Part of the Improved Faction series, actively maintained (last updated July 2026)

mods.name: NPCs Travel
mods.notes: Adds 300+ traveling NPCs (traders, hunters, scavengers, faction patrols) across the Commonwealth, Far Harbor and Nuka-World for a more populated world

mods.name: NPCs Travel - MCM Settings Menu
mods.notes: Adds full MCM configuration menu for NPCs Travel settings, including save/load of settings between games

mods.name: Misery Island - Isles Of New England
mods.notes: Large new worldspace based on the real-life Misery Islands near Salem. 20+ locations, 8 interiors, 2 settlements, own questline and radio station. Does not touch vanilla cells or precombines, very high compatibility with PRP

mods.name: Misery Island - eXoPatch
mods.notes: Rebalances enemies and gear in Misery Island

mods.name: Fallout 4 - Point Lookout
mods.notes: Full, faithful recreation of Fallout 3's Point Lookout DLC: all quests, locations, NPCs, enemies and most items. Requires all Fallout 4 DLCs and XDI (dialogue scenes with more than 4 options)

mods.name: Point Lookout - Essential Fixes and Additions
mods.notes: Fixes bugs (e.g. Velvet Curtain quest restart issue) and adds power supply to the Farm Shack player home

mods.name: Boon Island - Isles Of New England
mods.notes: First chapter of the Isles Of New England series. Small atmospheric island off the coast of Maine with a fully voiced quest and settlement. Does not touch vanilla cells or precombines. Confirmed compatible with game version 1.10.163

mods.name: Ashland Station - Quest-Dungeon-Settlement
mods.notes: New subway station location with fully voiced lore-friendly quest, settlement with immersive repairs, expansive dungeon, and custom legendary weapon/armor effects. By the same authors as the Isles of New England series

mods.name: Caves Of The Commonwealth
mods.notes: Adds 5 new cave locations with 5 new quests, custom audio/textures/animations, designed to fit seamlessly into vanilla with balanced loot and lore-friendly backstories

mods.name: The Wild Key Chase - Quest and Location mod
mods.notes: 5 reimagined locations tied together by a quest from Sanctuary through Diamond City to the Salem coast. Lore-friendly, fair and balanced, roughly 1-2 hours of gameplay. By shreddah4

mods.name: Bradberton Interiors
mods.notes: 7 new interiors in Bradberton, Nuka-World, with own quest. Confirmed perfectly compatible with Beantown Interiors Project, does not touch vanilla navmesh. Requires Nuka-World DLC. By shreddah4

mods.name: Weapon Overhaul Project (WOP)
mods.notes: Curated integration of Service Rifle, M1 Garand, Wattz Laser Gun, Point Lookout weapon and 22LR Pistol with balance fixes between them. Modular installer, actively maintained

mods.name: Chinese Assault Rifle - REBORN
mods.notes: Updated revisit of Wasteland Melody's Chinese Assault Rifle with tweaks and additions. Optional Tactical Reload patch available

mods.name: Grease Gun SMG
mods.notes: Adds the Grease Gun (9mm Submachine Gun) as seen in Fallout 2 and New Vegas

mods.name: M72 Gauss Rifle
mods.notes: Classic Fallout 2 style Gauss Rifle with custom animations, script-based leveled list integration. Requires Nuka-World DLC and game version 1.10.162+

mods.name: T6M's Standalone Anti-Materiel Rifle
mods.notes: Standalone, well-balanced Anti-Materiel Rifle conversion, praised in the community for its balance

mods.name: Institute Pulse Carbine
mods.notes: New Institute weapon on par with vanilla plasma weapons, adds tracking projectile option. Leveled list integration from level 20

mods.name: Pulse Carbine Fix
mods.notes: Fixes two small bugs with standard and improvised stock mods on the Pulse Carbine

mods.name: Classic Combat Armor
mods.notes: Brings back the Fallout 3/New Vegas style Combat Armor (Light/Medium/Heavy). Statistically identical to vanilla, purely visual difference. Script-based leveled list injection

mods.name: Fallout 4 Capital Wasteland Classic Metal Armor
mods.notes: Adds the classic Metal Armor from Fallout 3/New Vegas with 4 underarmor options and a level-based tier system. Script-based leveled list integration, spawns from level 15

mods.name: Gunner Outfit Pack (STANDALONE)
mods.notes: Modder's resource adding 215 Gunner-themed outfits, helmets, masks and backpacks. Standalone only, needs a distribution mod to appear on Gunner NPCs

mods.name: Thats Gunner Life - Gunner Outfit Pack Distribution and Balance
mods.notes: Actively maintained (March 2026) distribution and balance overhaul for Gunner Outfit Pack. Level-tiered spawning, rebalanced stats to make Gunners feel like a credible military threat rather than raiders with different textures

mods.name: Capital Wasteland Outfit Pack
mods.notes: Faithful recreations of Fallout 3 misc outfits (Tenpenny Suit, jumpsuits, pre-war outfits). Leveled list integration

mods.name: Capital Wasteland Outfit Pack Part II
mods.notes: Second collection of ~50 Fallout 3 style outfits including Recon Armor, unique named outfits (Colonel Autumn, General Chase, Mechanist)

mods.name: Private Military Company - PMC
mods.notes: Adds a modern PMC-style outfit with custom camouflages and gloves, craftable at the Chemistry Station

mods.name: Private Military Company Extended
mods.notes: Adds more patches, camouflages and a new vest loadout for PMC

mods.name: The Mercenary - Pack
mods.notes: Comprehensive outfit pack (B-90, Rebel, SNCR, Gunner overhaul, Wastelander outfits) designed to visually blend seamlessly with vanilla assets

mods.name: HUDFramework
mods.notes: Framework for custom HUD elements by kinggath, used by Sim Settlements 2 and other mods. FallUI - HUD explicitly supports and auto-patches for HUDFramework, no conflict

mods.name: Rise of the Commonwealth for Sim Settlements 2
mods.notes: 36 upgradeable City Plans covering every vanilla and DLC settlement, ported forward from the original Sim Settlements Rise of the Commonwealth by the SS2 team

mods.name: Blad3K1ll3r's SS2 Mega Expansion Pack
mods.notes: Growing add-on pack of building plans covering various SS2 plot types and sub-types

mods.name: City Plan Contest Megapack for Sim Settlements 2
mods.notes: Over 160 City Plans from the full history of the City Plan Contest, including plans ported from the original Sim Settlements. All ESL-flagged

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Plotapalooza Building Plan Pack
mods.notes: Official all-in-one pack bundling numerous individual Plotapalooza contest entries (Contests 1 and 2) from many community authors

mods.name: Bad Neighbors - Sim Settlements 2 Addon Pack
mods.notes: Community addon pack by MrJoseCuervo & Tinuvia

mods.name: Bubble's Apothecary - SS2 Plotapalooza 4 entry
mods.notes: Plotapalooza 4 contest entry by COEH77

mods.name: Dr. Fitz's Traveling Show - An SS2 Plotapalooza 4 Entry
mods.notes: Plotapalooza 4 contest entry by SonicPhil

mods.name: Favelabulous
mods.notes: SS2 building plan addon by kopfjagger

mods.name: GavMan's Buildings - SS2 Add-on
mods.notes: SS2 building plan addon by GavMan, includes a Recruitment Center plan for Chapter 3 Outposts

mods.name: GavMan's Church SS2 Plotapalooza AddOn
mods.notes: Plotapalooza contest entry by GavMan

mods.name: GavMan's Milky SS2 Plotapalooza 3 AddOn
mods.notes: 3x3 High-Tech Agricultural plot. WARNING from author: known navmesh/walkability bug on front steps, author suggests not using in a live playthrough yet. Requires Sim Settlements Extended (SS2 Chapter 3 optional file)

mods.name: Have a Nuka Sim Settlements 2 plot
mods.notes: New 3x3 and interior commercial plots specializing in Nuka Cola variants, custom vendor, new apparel. Requires Nuka-World DLC

mods.name: Jampads 2 - a Sim Settlements 2 Add-on
mods.notes: 68 building plans plus variants (homes, farms, industrial, martial, municipal, recreational). Requires all DLCs including Creation Club Content for full content

mods.name: Mystic Rogues Den SS2 Add-On Pack
mods.notes: 13-pack of new SS2 add-on plots (hotel, gardens, newspaper office, security office, bathrooms, kitchen, arcade, living rooms)

mods.name: SS2 - SGO Wasteland Expansion
mods.notes: 36 plots with skins across Agriculture, Commercial, Martial, Municipal, Residential and Recreational categories. Confirmed working on both Next-Gen and Old-Gen (1.10.163). No Creation Club content required

mods.name: Roving Robo Repairs - SS2 Plotapalooza 4 Entry
mods.notes: 2x2 commercial robotics store. Compatible with both OG and NG Fallout 4. Not yet included in any All-in-One pack

mods.name: SS2 - Robo-Claw Bots - Plotapalooza 4 Entry
mods.notes: 2x2 commercial robotics store plot. Not yet included in any All-in-One pack (planned for future merge into author's Rebirth of the Commonwealth addon)

mods.name: SS2 - Sales From Below - Pra's Plotapalooza 4 Entry
mods.notes: 2x2 General Goods store that drills up from below into the settlement. Requires Automatron DLC. SS2-only, no standalone version planned

mods.name: SS2 Addon - Shazbot's Cots
mods.notes: Five spartan, barracks-style residential plots with multiple skin options

mods.name: SS2 Settlers at Play
mods.notes: Recreational plot pack: Game Night tabletop plot, Shrine (8 skins), Central Park, Cafeteria series. Requires all DLCs

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - So I Made Plans Addon Pack
mods.notes: Adds building plans like artillery and small homes by Mikimikinyan

mods.name: SS2 Superstructures - A Sim Settlements 2 Addon Pack
mods.notes: Large pack: 53 plots plus 270 foundations. Confirmed compatible with 1.10.163

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Ruined Homes and Gardens 2.0
mods.notes: 40+ residential/decorative plots by Ruinedworld

mods.name: Wasteland Venturers Sim Settlements 2 Addon Pack
mods.notes: Very large, well-established pack: 164 building plans by Tinuvia

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Pra's Random Addon 2
mods.notes: Large, actively updated mixed-category plot pack by Pra

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Junk Town 2 Addon Pack
mods.notes: Junk-themed building plans by uituit

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 Scrappers
mods.notes: 49 plots by ohnno

mods.name: SS2 Support Structures of the Wasteland (Add-on Pack)
mods.notes: Support/infrastructure-themed building plans by stragest

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Apocalyptic Additions Addon Pack
mods.notes: Post-apocalyptic themed plots by sirlach

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Far Harbor Expansion
mods.notes: Far Harbor themed plots and city plans by greenFoxel. Requires Far Harbor DLC

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - From Sanctuary to Concord - Building Plans Module
mods.notes: Early-game area building plans by greenFoxel

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Nuka World Expansion
mods.notes: Nuka-World themed plots by greenFoxel. Requires Nuka-World DLC

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Rags and Riches
mods.notes: Wealth-tier themed residential/commercial plots by greenFoxel (Foxel)

mods.name: SimHomestead 2 - A SimSettlements 2 addon
mods.notes: Residential-focused building plan pack by Eldarth

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Tiny Living
mods.notes: Compact/small-footprint residential plots by Freddrick

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 Addon Pack - Rebirth of the Commonwealth
mods.notes: Ever-growing building plan pack by Pesky Fox (successor to 'New Suits You'). Recommends Sim Settlements 2 Extended (SS2 Chapter 3 optional file) to avoid purple textures

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 Addon Pack (unverified - check Nexus ID 96315)
mods.notes: Not individually verified due to time constraints - confirm name, description and dependencies on Nexus before downloading

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 Addon Pack (unverified - check Nexus ID 79520)
mods.notes: Not individually verified due to time constraints - confirm name, description and dependencies on Nexus before downloading

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 Addon Pack (unverified - check Nexus ID 48700)
mods.notes: Not individually verified due to time constraints - confirm name, description and dependencies on Nexus before downloading

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 Addon Pack (unverified - check Nexus ID 82223)
mods.notes: Not individually verified due to time constraints - confirm name, description and dependencies on Nexus before downloading

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 Addon Pack (unverified - check Nexus ID 79526)
mods.notes: Not individually verified due to time constraints - confirm name, description and dependencies on Nexus before downloading

mods.name: Bastion - A Power Armor Overhaul
mods.notes: Power Armor absorbs and prevents damage per-part until armor pieces break. Lore-friendly, fair and balanced. Actively maintained (June 2026)

mods.name: Power Armors Redone - 4K 2K HD
mods.notes: Retextures for all vanilla and DLC Power Armors in 2K/4K, based on official HD DLC textures, kept close to original design

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 Wasteland Reconstruction Kit
mods.notes: Over 10,000 buildable items for Sim Settlements 2, including dozens of prefab building models

mods.name: Wasteland Workshop Evolved (WWE)
mods.notes: Curated expansion of the workshop building system (fencing, Vault-Tec beds, lighting, military barricades). Deliberately kept from overloading the build menu

mods.name: Wasteland Resources
mods.notes: 81 new settlement objects for resource production: brewery/distillery, greenhouses, hydroponics, compost

mods.name: Legendary Effect Overhaul (LEO)
mods.notes: Modular overhaul of the legendary system: craft/detach/swap effects, optional additional legendary slots, Fallout 76 effects as toggleable option. Fully configurable via holotape or MCM. Anniversary Update Compatible, no AWKCR required

mods.name: Barter - A Vendor and Economy Overhaul
mods.notes: Reduces vendor caps to realistic amounts (30-50), makes trading more central than cap-farming junk. Dynamic restock system based on prior trading. Patching-script based for high compatibility

mods.name: Perk Up - Lightweight Perk Overhaul
mods.notes: Lightweight rework of individual underperforming perks (Inspirational, Iron Fist, Refractor, Ghoulish, etc.) rather than a full skill-tree overhaul. Matches a vanilla-plus philosophy

mods.name: OLD WORLD RADIO - BOSTON
mods.notes: 30+ new fully voiced radio stations with over 300 hours of content, 1500+ sound effects, plus craftable radios, flags, posters and billboards for settlements. Considered the reference mod for radio expansion

mods.name: Looks Menu Customization Compendium
mods.notes: Adds hundreds of customization options (face paint, tattoos, scars, makeup, brows, hair colors). Standard prerequisite framework for most community character presets

mods.name: Cirilla Fiona Elen Riannon - A looksmenu preset
mods.notes: LooksMenu preset recreating Ciri from The Witcher 3

mods.name: Nomore eye shine
mods.notes: Reduces the vanilla eye shine/reflection effect

mods.name: The Eyes Of Beauty Fallout Edition
mods.notes: High resolution eye texture replacer/expansion for both genders

mods.name: Ponytail Hairstyles by Azar
mods.notes: Standalone ponytail hairstyles for female characters

mods.name: Valkyr Female Face and Body Textures
mods.notes: Female face and body texture replacer

mods.name: Configurable Hotkeys
mods.notes: Configure hotkeys entirely via MCM: create standard saves (including Survival mode), use items, wait anywhere, execute console commands or custom functions

mods.name: xSE PluginPreloader F4
mods.notes: Loads certain F4SE plugins before the game itself starts. Required by Buffout 4 on old-gen F4SE (0.6.23), which lacks the newer built-in preload method available in Next-Gen F4SE releases. Installs to the game's root folder (WinHTTP.dll, xSE PluginPreloader.xml), not the Data folder - requires Root Builder in MO2

mods.name: Spell Perk Item Distributor (SPID)
mods.notes: F4SE plugin allowing mod authors to distribute spells/perks/items/packages to NPCs via config files, without needing plugins. Used by 72+ other mods

mods.name: Baka Framework
mods.notes: Required dependency framework for Spell Perk Item Distributor

mods.name: Garden of Eden Papyrus Script Extender
mods.notes: F4SE plugin adding 1150+ native Papyrus script functions for mod authors. Required by Amazing FollowerTweaks Plus. IMPORTANT: Multi-version mod - select the file specifically built for game version 1.10.163 (OG), not NG/AE variants

mods.name: Random Encounter Framework
mods.notes: Reorganizes the game's random encounter story manager nodes for safe modding compatibility. Requires Automatron, Far Harbor and Nuka-World DLCs. Required by Improved Institute, Improved Railroad, Improved Minutemen and Improved Brotherhood of Steel

mods.name: Fast Travel From Quest Hubs
mods.notes: Adds fast travel markers for quest hub interiors (Cambridge PD, Prydwen, Acadia, The Nucleus), reducing loading screens. Required by a Vault4 patch file already in this list. Load before mods that edit DLC faction cells

mods.name: Ceft's Main File
mods.notes: Modder's resource: various meshes, textures and material swaps. Required by Open Lexington

mods.name: Random Encounter Framework Patch Hub
mods.notes: FOMOD installer with patches hooking various mods (including America Rising 2 and REFramework) into Random Encounter Framework for even distribution. Auto-detects installed mods

mods.name: SS2 - XDI Compatibility Patch
mods.notes: Fixes dialogue in Grey Matters and Who Can? ASAM quests to work correctly with XDI. Some users report needing 'Wolfmark's fix' instead after recent SS2 updates - check XDI's own requirements page if this patch seems ineffective

mods.name: Outcasts and Remnants - Sim Settlements 2 Immersion Patch
mods.notes: Moves Raiders Emporium entrance and adds Hijack Recognition for select cells. Part of the Thuggyverse patch series

mods.name: Project Valkyrie - Sim Settlements 2 Immersion Patch
mods.notes: Fixes the Malpractice quest to work regardless of whether Mass Bay Medical is hijacked by SS2, and fixes Institute/Railroad recruitment. Part of the Thuggyverse patch series

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Previsibines Expansion Pack
mods.notes: Improves framerate in larger SS2 Chapter 2/3 interior cells. Works independently of PRP but best used with it. Needs base PRP-SS2 file plus Chapter 1 and 2 fix files confirmed on the mod page. A Chapter 3 fix file may or may not be needed/available - check the mod page directly, or search Aurorizon's Previs Patches (Nexus ID 95644) for a specific SS2/Chapter 3 named file if needed

mods.name: The Machine and Her XDI patch
mods.notes: Adds prompt text to dialogue responses for XDI compatibility. Enable both XDI.esm and this patch before playing

mods.name: Daytripper 4
mods.notes: F4SE engine-fix plugin, originally for Fallout 4 VR but several patches also work on OG/NG/AE. ExtendedArchiveLimit patch removes the vanilla 256 BA2 archive hard limit (raises it to 65536), solving BA2 Limit Crashes (LooseFileAsyncStream) on very large modlists without needing to manually unpack archives with Cathedral Assets Optimizer. Most other included fixes are VR-specific and inert on flatscreen. Config via Data\F4SE\Daytripper.toml

mods.name: Expressive Expressions
mods.notes: Enhancement overhaul of facial expression morphs, based on and close to vanilla rather than a ground-up replacement. Optional compatibility patches for HiPoly Faces REDUX and Realistic Facial Proportions available. Consider the optional Teeth Files if you want them.

mods.name: Facial Expression and Eyetracking Engine Fixes - F4SE
mods.notes: Pure engine bugfix, does not affect FaceGen/appearance. Fixes eyetracking staying inactive after load/cell transitions, wrong NPC look direction after Power Armor use, and NPCs losing facial expressions in crowded areas (>30 nearby actors). Configurable via Data\F4SE\Plugins\FacialExpressionAndEyeTrackingEngineFixes.ini

mods.name: Disable Companion Collision
mods.notes: Disables collision between player and companions. Built specifically for game version 1.10.163/F4SE 0.6.23. MCM-configurable. Installing/removing does not affect the save

mods.name: Ultimate Scrap Recipes
mods.notes: Precombine-friendly alternative to Scrap Everything. Author explicitly designed it to not break precombines. Optional precombine-disable patches exist but are not recommended for use with a heavily modded precombine-dependent setup like ours

mods.name: True Grass
mods.notes: Lore-friendly grass, plant and flora overhaul. Explicitly recommended by the author to be used alongside Natural & Atmospheric Commonwealth (NAC X), which we already have. Includes a performance ini for foliage density tuning. Not compatible with other grass-altering mods

mods.name: MCM Settings Manager
mods.notes: Save/load/export/import all MCM settings at once across up to 10 slots. No plugin, no Papyrus scripts - absolutely safe to install or remove mid-game at any time

mods.name: MS Raze my Settlement - F4SE
mods.notes: One-click holotape settlement clearing, returns scrapped components to the workbench like manual scrapping. MCM-configurable with toggleable categories. Dedicated Sim Settlements 2 compatibility patch available. KNOWN ISSUE: F4SE detection fails on this setup despite F4SE/SUP F4SE being correctly installed and functional (confirmed via console log) - function does not work. Tried -forcesteamloader argument and direct Fallout4.exe launch, neither resolved it (the latter also broke Buffout4 timing). Root cause not identified. Kept as alternative in case a future mod update fixes this

mods.name: This is Trash - A Scrapping Alternative
mods.notes: Adds a scrappable trash can next to every workbench that instantly removes all garbage/debris/dead grass in one click, without touching houses or large structures. Lighter-weight alternative/complement to MS Raze my Settlement

mods.name: SUP F4SE
mods.notes: F4SE plugin adding engine fixes (Scrap Crash Fix, Wireless Power Fix, Terminal Link Fix) and modder functions/events. Required by MS Raze my Settlement

mods.name: Raze My Settlement
mods.notes: One-click holotape settlement clearing. Deliberately does NOT require F4SE (author wanted Xbox compatibility), avoiding the F4SE-detection issue seen with MS Raze my Settlement - F4SE. Does not return exact scrapped materials; instead offers 'Add Basic Scrap' and 'Add Shipments' options for generic starting resources. Alternative/replacement for ms-raze-my-settlement

mods.name: Workshop Plus
mods.notes: Overhauls workshop mode into a full building tool: flight, undo/redo, layers, cloning tools, free build mode, tracking system for settlers/items. MCM is a soft requirement (needed for the hotkey system) but not strictly required

mods.name: FO4LODGen Resources
mods.notes: Required vanilla data restoration for xLODGen/FO4LODGen terrain LOD generation. Required before running xLODGen
